subcodes.title: The First Principle—Search after Truth: Words spoken on 1911-11-10 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: If a man would succeed in his search after truth, he must, in the first place, shut his eyes to all the traditional superstitions of the past.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیروز رفتیم در جمعیت روحانیون چون آنجمع
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @soul; spirit after death, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @blind imitation [taqlid], @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @oneness; unity of religion
